name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init == /\ participants = <<1, 2, 3>>
       /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
       /\ decision = "none"

Prepare == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"

VoteYes == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"

VoteNo == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"

Commit == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
          /\ decision = "commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "no"
          /\ decision = "abort"

Next == \/ Prepare
       \/ VoteYes
       \/ VoteNo
       \/ Commit
       \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

TypeOK == 
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {"None"} \/ State
  /\ state \in State

Init == 
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = "None"
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next == 
  \/ (* Follower receives a request for vote from a candidate *)
     /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = "None"
     /\ state' = "Follower"

  \/ (* Candidate receives a majority of votes *)
     /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = "None"
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
